title: acfbak configuration
description: Declarative configuration for acfbak: which Acquia environment to back up, which R2 bucket to write to, and on what schedule. Credentials are NOT defined here — they are supplied as secrets.

acquia.description: Acquia Cloud source. acfbak pulls the latest existing backup for this app/environment.

applicationName.description: Acquia Cloud application (subscription) name or UUID.

environment.description: Acquia environment to back up (e.g. prod, test, dev).

database.description: Database name within the environment. Defaults to the site's primary database.

r2.description: Cloudflare R2 destination. `binding` must match the [[r2_buckets]] binding in wrangler.toml; `bucket` must match its bucket_name.

binding.description: Worker env binding name for the destination bucket (wrangler.toml [[r2_buckets]].binding).

keyPrefix.description: Object key prefix under which backups are stored, e.g. <keyPrefix>/<env>/<timestamp>.sql.gz.

schedule.description: Backup schedule. The cron expression must be mirrored in wrangler.toml [triggers].crons, which is authoritative for the Cloudflare platform trigger.

cron.description: Cron expression for the scheduled backup (UTC).

timezone.description: Documentation-only timezone label. Cloudflare cron triggers run in UTC.
